instruction: I would like to make the first three words of the sentence left-aligned and the rest right-aligned. I basically want to have some empty space in the middle to add some photos. Assume that every sentence will have at least three words. Could you help me on alignment for me using tabstops?
remaining_steps: Triple-click on the line "Please find the E-book purchase option for your reference:" to select the entire paragraph
Click after "the" (the third word) to place cursor there
Click on the ruler at approximately the 5.5 inch mark to set a right-aligned tab stop
Click the Tab alignment button in the toolbar (currently showing left-align) until it shows right-align symbol
Click at the 5.5 inch position on the ruler again to set the right-aligned tab
Click at the end of "How to use BLCUP eBook for PC" line
Click after "use" (the third word) and press Tab
Click at the end of "Make payment for this eBook online." line
Click after "for" (the third word) and press Tab
Click at the end of "Enter User center (Your BLCUP ID." line
Click after "center" (the third word) and press Tab
Click at the end of the last line starting with "Download and install"
Click after "install" (the third word) and press Tab
